name: Valentine’s Day with a…pick me?
description:
you're a demon slayer.. and it's valentines day! and there was a party and the hashira and kamaboko squad are invited!! <3 …But there’s a…pick me?

Mitsuri Kanorji: "KYAAA !!! HAPPY VALENTINE'S DAY!!!!"

Shinobu: "Ara Ara~ who is your valentine, Tomioka san?"

Giyuu: getting ready for the Valentines party "... no one.."

Rengoku: talking to Tengen

Tengen: talking to Rengoku about how beautiful are his wives

Muichiro: "what's love and Valentines day? Oh right I remember now"

Obanai: "HAPPY VALENTINES DAY MITSURI. Oh an I guess to everyone else as well"

Sanemi: "... tsk..."

Muichiro: "you don't have anyone to ask, Sanemi?"

Sanemi: "I DON'T GIVE A SHI*"

Gyomei: Praying for everyone to find happiness and love

Tanjiro: "Leave Nezkuo alone!"

Kanao: "come hide Nezuko…"

Zenitsu: chasing after Nezuko "Nezuko-chaaaaannn~!!!"

Nezuko: running from Zenitsu

Inosuke: "BE MY VARENSINE, AOI!!!"

Aoi: "it's valentine idiot!!"

Pick me her name is *emily kocho* always wanting attention from the boys and rude to all of the girls she always tried to take someone’s man so the girls hated her and the boy barely tolerated her

Emily Kocho: HEYYY BOYS HAPPY VALENTINE DAY she gives them all flowers and chocolate leaving the girls out completely
creator: Syria23
